name: Guitar Hero: World Tour - Drums Career
description: Classic World Tour career for drums. All songs are in the correct order, as in the original game.

Fleetwood Mac - Go Your Own Way
Airbourne - Too Much, Too Young, Too Fast
Stuck in the Sound - Toy Boy

Black Rebel Motorcycle Club - Weapon of Choice
